4lmNM49YEJXPRNso.name: I INSIST
4lmNM49YEJXPRNso.description: Cast a cantrip for free, ignoring all disadvantage; it cannot miss.

xKVtXKzsEgq9KmMI.name: ELEMENTAL AFFLICTION
xKVtXKzsEgq9KmMI.description: A creature of your choice within 12 spaces gains the Charged, Smoldering, or Slowed condition.

WNMnMtSVJEqNpB5m.name: NO
WNMnMtSVJEqNpB5m.description: Choose a creature; it cannot harm a creature of your choice during its next turn.

KwKENKzXKHJqoUHe.name: LOSE CONTROL
KwKENKzXKHJqoUHe.description: Do ALL of the above, but the GM chooses each time.

Chaos Table.name: Chaos Table
Chaos Table.description: Unless otherwise noted, ongoing effects last for up to 1 minute or until Chaos is triggered again.

4pclmXhEjiw0PblN.name: Elemental Eruption
4pclmXhEjiw0PblN.description: Creatures within 6 spaces of you must make a DEX save or take INT d10 fire damage on a failure, half on save. You fail the save.

js3uyAs0CP5zDHJK.name: Backfire
js3uyAs0CP5zDHJK.description: Suffer 1 Wound. The spell you just cast also targets you (or an enemy if it was a beneficial spell).

54ODa7XWGrOgcU3t.name: Aww, Nuts!
54ODa7XWGrOgcU3t.description: You polymorph into a cute squirrel until you take damage. Your TOP priority is to find acorns (squirrels can't cast spells).

nij3W2UjjjPUIKLa.name: Summon Aetherlings
nij3W2UjjjPUIKLa.description: At the end of each of your turns, summon INT hostile aetherling minions adjacent to you that act immediately after you (size: d6).

MOnvOMk3UXY82isZ.name: Graviturgical Grace
MOnvOMk3UXY82isZ.description: A random enemy is pulled adjacent to you at the end of each of your turns.

KhUhJYt0kMHOA8rI.name: Liquefy Legs
KhUhJYt0kMHOA8rI.description: You fall Prone, cannot stand, and your speed becomes 0 while out of water.

JqDvl32ryloMqXYW.name: Elemental Entanglement
JqDvl32ryloMqXYW.description: An enemy controls 1 Action for you at the start of each of your turns.

7lQcYnM3HOtUFARe.name: Ethereal Cocoon
7lQcYnM3HOtUFARe.description: You are enveloped in a magical cocoon until the end of your next turn. You fall Prone, are unable to move or speak, and are immune to damage. You must spend all of your Actions casting cantrips at the nearest creature.

S84omYE48ojDBYoY.name: Manastorm
S84omYE48ojDBYoY.description: The last spell you cast is cast again for free, against a random target.

CmulzbXuhXjKiJoy.name: Reality Warp
CmulzbXuhXjKiJoy.description: Everywhere around you within 6 spaces is difficult terrain.

MVJnwMvbp3vlSrKC.name: Displacement
MVJnwMvbp3vlSrKC.description:
Teleport. [[/r 1d4]]:

  1. The worst place! (GM's choice)

  2. UP! 6 spaces (3d6 falling damage)

  3. Player's choice, 6 spaces

  4. Player's choice, 12 spaces

DNrUW9tq11q4iQga.name: Chaos Step
DNrUW9tq11q4iQga.description: Swap places with any creature you can see.

QZUrzh6DIPDsKojb.name: Mindfire
QZUrzh6DIPDsKojb.description: The dumbest enemy within 16 spaces takes INT d6 psychic damage (ignoring armor), and gains the Smoldering condition.

ddrC2Zb6tCBEu9kT.name: Emerge Beautiful
ddrC2Zb6tCBEu9kT.description: You sprout butterfly wings from your back; gain a flying speed.

IPgASrUp5X3ub10P.name: Unbiggen
IPgASrUp5X3ub10P.description: Your size is halved. Gain advantage on Stealth checks, and attacks against you are made with disadvantage.

tSLvOGbLasWBpPvp.name: Embiggen
tSLvOGbLasWBpPvp.description: Your size is doubled. Gain INT d10 Temp HP and advantage on STR saves instead of disadvantage.

BuzXATnqFCFrx2Ut.name: Awakening
BuzXATnqFCFrx2Ut.description: A 3rd eye appears on your fore head. Gain advantage on the Assess action and all attacks.

rnxCUdgId5d8upRt.name: Diamond Skin
rnxCUdgId5d8upRt.description: Multiply your Armor by INT; you can Defend for free each round.

dTqMvbKw83q4wmya.name: Mighty Mana
dTqMvbKw83q4wmya.description: Your spells (including the one that triggered this effect) are empowered and are cast as if you spent 2 additional mana on them (ignoring your natural max).

7VRNZ7u1jTndWBl8.name: Elemental Overload
7VRNZ7u1jTndWBl8.description: Enemies within 12 spaces of you take INT d8 lightning damage. You regain INT mana at the end of your turns (this mana expires at the end of combat if unused).
